c633788e03.translation: Who begs is spat on and beaten.

c6365e7d23.translation: What is the nature of the crime? How must it be punished?

c6547a2c40.translation: Ida took care of him, brought him broth, and cooled his forehead with damp cloths.

c6548cb4ce.text: „‚Eljen! Eljen!‘ jauchzten ein paar hundert Kehlen im Comitatshause zu Eperies.“
c6548cb4ce.translation: 'Cheers! Cheers!' a couple of hundred voices shouted in the county hall at Eperies.

c654edfea1.text: Beim Skat schoren wir für gewöhnlich den dritten Mann, bis irgendwann keiner mehr mit uns spielen wollte.

c656cf8f55.text: „Nach diesem Beweismaterial zu urteilen, befand ich mich unter schweren Jungens.“
c656cf8f55.translation: Based on this evidence, I was among the tough guys.

c658191106.translation: Put on something warm, after all, you don't want to die!

c658bfaafb.translation: But I am poor in body and soul and reveal this shadowy life with empty sighs.

c65b238c34.text: „Rumänien hat als säkulares Land keine Staatsreligion.“
c65b238c34.translation: Romania, as a secular country, has no state religion.

c65c9cc9d0.text: [Chemie: …:] „Beim Lösen eines Salzes muss zunächst die Gitterenergie aufgewendet werden, um die Anziehungskräfte zwischen den Ionen im Kristallgitter zu überwinden und die Ionen voneinander zu trennen.“
c65c9cc9d0.translation: When dissolving a salt, the lattice energy must first be supplied in order to overcome the attractive forces between the ions in the crystal lattice and to separate the ions from each other.

c65d4f4a8b.translation: He was seasick. He believed he was on a ship that was in rough seas.

c65d785814.text: Niedrige Zinsen, die Gefahr steigender Preise und dann noch Weihnachten: Geld auszugeben erscheint vielen Menschen derzeit ratsamer, als es anzulegen.
c65d785814.translation: Low interest rates, the danger of rising prices, and then Christmas: many people currently find it more sensible to spend money than to invest it.

c65eb76e8f.translation: The refugees found refuge in this village.

c660420099.text: Ich wollte dich mit meinen Äußerungen nicht kränken.
c660420099.translation: I didn't mean to hurt you with my comments.

c6618a03b5.translation: But I was an uncertain candidate from the start.

c663235673.translation: The advantage is that in the accumulator during formation, the conductivity is greatly increased.

c6637421b5.text: Er hat bedingungsloses Vertrauen zu seiner Freundin.
c6637421b5.translation: He has unconditional trust in his girlfriend.

c6659b7db8.translation: Hand on your heart – could you explain in one sentence how the Bundestag was elected in the past?

c665c19990.text: „Ein anderes Lebewesen, das das Böse verkörpert, ist die Riesenschlange, der man im Tal der Könige begegnet.“
c665c19990.translation: Another creature that embodies evil is the giant snake you encounter in the Valley of the Kings.

c668403b58.translation: The boy showed a dentition missing a front tooth.

c66a56716b.translation: In the same year, the struggling airline was taken over by a consortium of South Tyrolean industrialists led by Franz Senfter.

c66dc86399.translation: Every year, around 2.5 million Muslims make the pilgrimage to Mecca for the Hajj, while non-Muslims are forbidden from entering the city.

c66f78849f.text: „Bei den finiten Formen sind besonders die Diathesen zu erwähnen (die Unterscheidung zwischen Aktiv und Passiv; in der früheren Zeit gab es auch noch eine dritte, die funktionell häufig unserem Reflexivum entspricht, die mediale Diathese) sowie die Unterscheidung nach Tempus (Zeit) und Modus (Aussageart).“
c66f78849f.translation: In finite forms, especially the diatheses should be mentioned (the distinction between active and passive; in earlier times, there was also a third, which often corresponds to our reflexive, the medial diathesis), as well as the distinction by tense (time) and mood (statement type).

c671e7256f.translation: The refugees and displaced persons who came immediately after the war from the east and southeast made up about one-fifth of the population in some areas.

c67a711fec.translation: "We are not kidnappers. The boy is here voluntarily. He signed a contract. Ask him. Free will."

c68474b8eb.translation: After Bolchowitinow changed horses twice and covered thirty versts behind himself in one and a half hours through the sluggish dirt of the country road, he arrived in Letaschowka between one and two o'clock at night.

c685645521.text: Manche Leute legen viel Wert auf ihr Äußeres.
c685645521.translation: Some people place a lot of importance on their appearance.

c68579b7a3.translation: I drank a cup of hot chocolate, stuffed some biscuits into my bag, and returned to the palace, noticing that the same spy was coming after me.

c68590e9ee.text: „Nach Güteeigenschaften und Ausmaß der zugelassenen Mängel teilt man Gemüse (und Obst) in 3 Handelsklassen ein: „Extra“ (von höchster Qualität, erlaubt sind z. B. nur oberflächliche Schalenfehler); „I“ (von guter Qualität, leichte Fehler in Form, Entwicklung und Farbe erlaubt) und „II“ (von marktfähiger Qualität, entspricht nicht den Anforderungen der höheren Klassen, erfüllt jedoch die Mindesteigenschaften).“
c68590e9ee.translation: According to quality characteristics and extent of permitted defects, vegetables (and fruit) are classified into 3 commercial grades: "Extra" (of highest quality, only superficial skin defects are permitted, for example); "Class I" (of good quality, slight defects in shape, development and color permitted) and "Class II" (of marketable quality, does not meet the requirements of higher classes, but meets the minimum characteristics).

c6867bed39.text: Heute läuft die »S.M. Yacht Hohenzollern« ein, eine Staatsyacht des Kaisers.
c6867bed39.translation: Today, the »S.M. Yacht Hohenzollern« is arriving, an imperial yacht of the emperor.

c687003e64.text: „Und auch in der Forschung haben die Hochschulen aufgeholt.“
c687003e64.translation: And in research, universities have also caught up.

c68793966f.text: „In einem defensiv geprägten Spiel konnten die Gäste nach einer ausgeglichenen ersten Halbzeit erst im letzten Viertel den Sieg unter Dach und Fach bringen.“
c68793966f.translation: In a defensively oriented game, the visitors could only secure the victory in the final quarter after a balanced first half.

c6881c6166.translation: They received their financial support and immediately went to the supermarket.

c689cfe79c.text: „Halte die brennende Kerze zuerst hoch oben, nahe am Türstock; die Flamme schlägt hinaus. Unten am Staffel schlägt sie herein und in der Mitte brennt sie senkrecht.“
c689cfe79c.translation: Hold the burning candle first high up, close to the door frame; the flame shoots outward. At the bottom of the ladder it shoots inward and in the middle it burns vertically.

c68aa73850.text: „Ohne meine Brille sehe ich alles nur unscharf.“
c68aa73850.translation: Without my glasses, I see everything only blurred.

c68b1c4f91.text: „Was gelegentlich aus den Augen gerät: Während die Eltern manchmal dazu neigen, die Reisestrapazen möglichst rasch abzuhaken, ist für das Kind bereits der Weg das Ziel: zusammen sein und Spaß haben, egal wo, auch im Bahnabteil.“
c68b1c4f91.translation: What is sometimes overlooked: While parents sometimes tend to quickly check off travel hardships, for the child, the journey itself is the goal: to be together and have fun, no matter where, even in the train compartment.

c68b683a4e.text: Bei Conny und Frank sieht man einmal wieder, dass Gegensätze sich anziehen.
c68b683a4e.translation: At Conny and Frank, you can see once again that opposites attract.

c68bc77704.text: Im Westen grenzt Frankreich an den Atlantik.
c68bc77704.translation: In the west, France borders the Atlantic.

c68cb314c6.translation: As early as last autumn, North Rhine-Westphalia had drafted a federal council initiative.

c68df4f7f1.text: Der erwählten Person werden besondere Privilegien zugestanden.
c68df4f7f1.translation: The chosen person is granted special privileges.

c6923dfc3f.translation: We have rested on our laurels for too long.

c69897a86c.translation: Our early relatives were more cultivated than thought: In a cave in Gibraltar, researchers discovered patterns that originate from Neanderthals. They appear to be Stone Age decorations.

c6994cd23e.translation: Your constant taking offense is slowly getting on my nerves!

c6997849ef.text: Stets muß der Notar als neutraler Dritter Informationsvorsprünge einer Partei ausgleichen, ein Machtgefälle berücksichtigen und bemüht sein, daß kein Beteiligter über den Tisch gezogen wird.
c6997849ef.translation: The notary must always act as a neutral third party to balance out information advantages of one party, consider the power imbalance, and ensure that no participant is taken for a ride.

c69ad79b6b.translation: After some time, the first quiet drops appear on the glass.

c69b846855.translation: Currently, large glass surfaces are in fashion on the building facade itself, making an exterior wall completely transparent, turning a gable from head to foot transparent, or creating a light island in the living area with a gallery.

c6a0460975.translation: The surgeon requested new surgical instruments.

c6a25b06e2.translation: One could say he's moving in slow motion towards the end of a dead end, namely the end of the old times.

c6a2cec715.translation: How long a boy took, Mama couldn't imagine, because she wore skirts and shoes without laces.

c6a2fe022f.translation: It is the aunt who found her niece and nephew through the search service.

c6a3c0be25.translation: He should be writing, but life in Plock hardly lends itself to that, unless he wants to devote himself to music after work.

c6a67098be.translation: Don't lean out so far, or you'll fall down!

c6a6c8deb8.translation: He came down the steps and entered the garden path, which led directly to my hiding place.

c6a6c9fdaa.translation: The lone wolf was an unobtrusive loner who didn't form many close friendships even in his shooting club, but he always greeted everyone very nicely.

c6a700796f.translation: The uprisings [...] ended in 939 with the death of Eberhard and the provisional end of the ducal title in Franconia after only 33 years.

c6a7b774f7.translation: He secluded himself in his room for weeks and hardly dared to step outside the house.

c6a7dad876.text: Ich hätte gerne ein Teil daraus.
c6a7dad876.translation: I would like to have a part of it.

c6a87a507e.translation: He looks like an established politician and also looks a bit like one: shirt neatly tucked in his trousers, polished shoes.

c6a9188439.translation: I just came from the dentist; after the anesthesia, the entire right side of my face is numb.

c6a9f66632.text: „Christian kauft an einer 24-Stunden-Tankstelle ein Käsesandwich und eine Schokoladenmilch.“
c6a9f66632.translation: Christian buys a cheese sandwich and a chocolate milk at a 24-hour gas station.

c6aade7db0.text: „Obschon nur ein paar Prozent des Universums aus sichtbarer Materie bestehen, sind vier Fünftel davon bisher unauffindbar.“
c6aade7db0.translation: Although only a few percent of the universe consists of visible matter, four-fifths of it are so far unfindable.

c6ab195be0.text: „Das eine [spanische] wie das andere [britische] Imperium kann durchaus auch als informelles Bündnis europäischer und kolonialer Eliten zur Ausbeutung der kolonialen und bisweilen auch der europäischen Unterschichten angesehen werden.“
c6ab195be0.translation: Both the one [Spanish] and the other [British] empire can certainly be regarded as an informal alliance of European and colonial elites for the exploitation of colonial and sometimes also European lower classes.

c6e2ec2d02.text: Und ist es nicht Wert zu erwähnen, dass dein Vater die Kaution hinterlegt hat?
c6e2ec2d02.translation: And is it not worth mentioning that your father has deposited the bail?

c6e36ddbcd.text: Er hat schon wieder einen Fleck geschrieben.
c6e36ddbcd.translation: He got a failing grade again.

c6e383fc5e.text: „Ein leiser Asphaltbelag, ein ordentlicher Gehweg, eine Beleuchtung des Nachts: Davon profitieren Anwohner in Seitenstraßen mehr als fremde Autofahrer, die mal vorbeifahren.“
c6e383fc5e.translation: A quiet asphalt surface, a proper sidewalk, and nighttime lighting: residents in side streets benefit more than strangers passing by in cars.

c6e5dfce2f.text: „Als ihre Bitten um Besuchserlaubnis schroff, ja mit Drohungen abgelehnt wurden — sie war selbst von Mannheim, wo sie jetzt lebte, nach Westhofen gekommen — fasste die Frau den Entschluss, ihren Mann zu retten, koste es, was es wolle.“
c6e5dfce2f.translation: When her requests for permission to visit were brusquely, even with threats, refused — she herself had come from Mannheim, where she now lived, to Westhofen — the woman decided to save her husband, whatever the cost.

c6eb2a728d.translation: Therefore, the bladder capacity in affected children is lower and the urge to urinate is more intense.

c6ed4c5529.translation: Let the little girl eat with the five-pronged fork! It tastes best with your fingers.

c6ed810f4e.text: „An einem Pult werden Etuiinhalte verglichen. «Ich hab gar keine Tintenpatronen drin», beklagt sich ein Junge. Dafür hat er coole Delfine drauf – und auf dem Schulthek im Fall auch.“
c6ed810f4e.translation: At a desk, the contents of pencil cases are being compared. "I don't have any ink cartridges in mine at all," complains a boy. Instead, he has cool dolphins on it – and on his school bag in case as well.

c6ef3594c2.text: „Und so machte er sich gleich am Montagvormittag auf den Weg einen Vogel zu suchen, der zu den seltensten zählt, die es hier in Deutschland gibt: eine Großtrappe. Da es neblig war am Rapsfeld gleich hinter Buschhof in Richtung Mirow, wo der ‚europäische Strauß‘ aufgetaucht war, gab er den Versuch auf.“
c6ef3594c2.translation: And so he set out on Monday morning to look for a bird, one of the rarest found here in Germany: a great bustard. Since it was foggy at the rapeseed field right behind Buschhof towards Mirow, where the 'European ostrich' had appeared, he gave up the attempt.

c6f5805d5e.text: „Ich riß meinen Operngucker heraus und gewahrte nun deutlich die blendend weiße, schön geformte Hand eines Frauenzimmers, an deren kleinem Finger ein Brillant mit ungewöhnlichem Feuer funkelte, ein reiches Band blitzte an dem in üppiger Schönheit geründeten Arm.“ (E.T.A. Hoffmann, Das öde Haus)
c6f5805d5e.translation: I tore out my opera glasses and now clearly saw the dazzling white, beautifully shaped hand of a lady, on whose small finger a diamond sparkled with unusual fire, a rich ribbon flashed on the arm, which was adorned with lush beauty.

c6f86e3de5.text: „Eine große alte fleischige Katze lag träg ausgebreitet auf dem Tisch und die Lehrerin untersuchte ihre offenbar ein wenig verletzte Pfote. Frieda hatte also doch recht gehabt, diese Katze war zwar nicht auf sie gesprungen, denn springen konnte sie wohl nicht mehr, aber über sie hinweggekrochen, war über die Anwesenheit von Menschen in dem sonst leeren Hause erschrocken, hatte sich eilig versteckt und bei dieser ihr ungewohnten Eile verletzt.“
c6f86e3de5.translation: A large old fleshy cat was lying sluggishly spread out on the table, and the teacher was examining its apparently slightly injured paw. Frieda was right after all; this cat hadn't jumped on her, because it probably couldn't jump anymore, but had crept over her, was frightened by the presence of people in the otherwise empty house, had hurriedly hidden itself, and in this unfamiliar haste, had injured itself.
